metadata.description: Ramazan's personal collection of Claude Code skills.

plugins.name: skillz
plugins.description: A growing bundle of personal Claude Code skills. Currently: file-transfer (push/pull files to the macminim Mac mini over passwordless SSH), claude-ai-archive (import/sync a claude.ai data export into a local on-disk mirror), sprite (Sprite VM environment agent), and sprite-api-gateway (authenticated external API access from a Sprite).
